title: Montolivaea attenuata
taxonomy: Montolivaea attenuata is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Montolivaea. As a member of the Brassicaceae family, Montolivaea attenuata is closely related to other plants like broccoli, cabbage, and mustard. The classification of Montolivaea attenuata places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Further taxonomic classification includes the order Brassicales and family Brassicaceae.

The traditional medicinal uses of Montolivaea attenuata are not well-documented and require further investigation.
